fields.name: derivatives
fields.title: Derivative Pipeline
fields.description: Pipeline name extracted from the derivatives/ folder path. NA if the file is not in a derivatives directory.

fields.name: data_type
fields.title: Data Type
fields.description: BIDS data type inferred from the directory structure, indicating the broad category of data.

fields.name: subject
fields.title: Subject
fields.description: A person or animal participating in the study. Corresponds to the sub-<label> entity.

fields.name: session
fields.title: Session
fields.description: A logical grouping of neuroimaging and behavioral data consistent across subjects. Corresponds to the ses-<label> entity.

fields.name: sample
fields.title: Sample
fields.description: A sample pertaining to a subject such as tissue, primary cell, or cell-free sample. Corresponds to the sample-<label> entity.

fields.name: task
fields.title: Task
fields.description: A set of structured activities performed by the participant. Corresponds to the task-<label> entity.

fields.name: tracksys
fields.title: Tracking System
fields.description: Tracking system used for motion data. Corresponds to the tracksys-<label> entity.

fields.name: acquisition
fields.title: Acquisition
fields.description: Custom label to distinguish a different set of parameters used for acquiring the same modality. Corresponds to the acq-<label> entity.

fields.name: nucleus
fields.title: Nucleus
fields.description: Nucleus or nuclei targeted by the acquisition, corresponding to DICOM Tag 0018,9100. Corresponds to the nuc-<label> entity.

fields.name: volume
fields.title: Volume of Interest
fields.description: Region or body part scanned, used to distinguish acquisitions localized to different regions. Corresponds to the voi-<label> entity.

fields.name: ceagent
fields.title: Contrast Enhancing Agent
fields.description: Contrast agent used to distinguish sequences using different contrast enhanced images. Corresponds to the ce-<label> entity.

fields.name: tracer
fields.title: Tracer
fields.description: Tracer used to distinguish sequences using different tracers. Corresponds to the trc-<label> entity.

fields.name: stain
fields.title: Stain
fields.description: Stain or antibody used for contrast enhancement in microscopy. Corresponds to the stain-<label> entity.

fields.name: reconstruction
fields.title: Reconstruction
fields.description: Reconstruction algorithm used (for example, MoCo for motion correction). Corresponds to the rec-<label> entity.

fields.name: direction
fields.title: Phase-Encoding Direction
fields.description: Phase-encoding direction used to distinguish different acquisitions (for example, AP, PA, LR, RL). Corresponds to the dir-<label> entity.

fields.name: run
fields.title: Run
fields.description: Run index distinguishing separate data acquisitions with the same parameters and entities. Nonnegative integer. Corresponds to the run-<index> entity.

fields.name: modality
fields.title: Corresponding Modality
fields.description: Modality label for defacing masks, referencing the modality of the image being defaced. Corresponds to the mod-<label> entity.

fields.name: echo
fields.title: Echo
fields.description: Echo index distinguishing files acquired at different echo times. Nonnegative integer. Corresponds to the echo-<index> entity.

fields.name: flip
fields.title: Flip Angle
fields.description: Flip angle index distinguishing files acquired at different flip angles. Nonnegative integer. Corresponds to the flip-<index> entity.

fields.name: inversion
fields.title: Inversion Time
fields.description: Inversion time index distinguishing files acquired at different inversion times. Nonnegative integer. Corresponds to the inv-<index> entity.

fields.name: mtransfer
fields.title: Magnetization Transfer
fields.description: Magnetization transfer state indicating presence or absence of an MT pulse. Corresponds to the mt-<label> entity.

fields.name: part
fields.title: Part
fields.description: Component of the complex MRI signal representation (magnitude, phase, real, or imaginary). Corresponds to the part-<label> entity.

fields.name: processing
fields.title: Processed (on device)
fields.description: Processing variant performed on the device, analogous to rec for MR (for example, MaxFilter sss, tsss, trans). Corresponds to the proc-<label> entity.

fields.name: hemisphere
fields.title: Hemisphere
fields.description: Hemibrain described by the file. Corresponds to the hemi-<label> entity.

fields.name: space
fields.title: Space
fields.description: Coordinate system or reference image for interpreting spatial coordinates. Corresponds to the space-<label> entity.

fields.name: split
fields.title: Split
fields.description: Split index for long recordings that exceed file size limits (for example, 2GB .fif files). Nonnegative integer. Corresponds to the split-<index> entity.

fields.name: recording
fields.title: Recording
fields.description: Label distinguishing continuous recording files from different instruments, sampling frequencies, or start times. Corresponds to the recording-<label> entity.

fields.name: chunk
fields.title: Chunk
fields.description: Chunk index distinguishing images of the same physical sample with different fields of view. Nonnegative integer. Corresponds to the chunk-<index> entity.

fields.name: segmentation
fields.title: Segmentation
fields.description: Custom label distinguishing specific partitions of the data space (segmentations or parcellations). Derivative data only. Corresponds to the seg-<label> entity.

fields.name: resolution
fields.title: Resolution
fields.description: Resolution of regularly sampled N-dimensional data. Derivative data only. Corresponds to the res-<label> entity.

fields.name: density
fields.title: Density
fields.description: Density of non-parametric surfaces. Derivative data only. Corresponds to the den-<label> entity.

fields.name: label
fields.title: Label
fields.description: Tissue-type label following a prescribed vocabulary, used for binary masks and probabilistic segmentations. Derivative data only. Corresponds to the label-<label> entity.

fields.name: description
fields.title: Description
fields.description: Free-form label used to distinguish two files that do not otherwise have a distinguishing entity. Derivative data only. Corresponds to the desc-<label> entity.

fields.name: suffix
fields.title: Suffix
fields.description: BIDS file suffix indicating the imaging modality or data type (for example, bold, T1w, dwi, events).

fields.name: extension
fields.title: Extension
fields.description: File extension including the leading dot (for example, .nii.gz, .json, .tsv).

fields.name: path
fields.title: File Path
fields.description: Full file path to the BIDS data file.
